personal.name: Arun Govindgari
personal.summary: Data Engineer with 3+ years of experience building scalable ETL/ELT pipelines on Azure (ADF, Databricks, Synapse). MS in Data Science from UNT. Proven track record reducing manual processing by 60% and improving pipeline performance by 40% through Spark optimization and CI/CD automation. Experienced in healthcare data engineering (HL7 FHIR, HIPAA).

experience.title: Data Engineer
highlights: Designed ETL pipelines using Azure Data Factory & Databricks to process healthcare datasets into structured formats
Engineered HL7 FHIR-compliant data transformation workflows supporting patient-centric analytics
Automated data ingestion & reporting with Python — reducing manual effort by 60%
Optimized Spark & SQL transformations with PostgreSQL integration, cutting execution time by 40%
Configured CI/CD workflows reducing release cycle time by 80%
Built HIPAA/USCDI-compliant secure data handling workflows

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Designed ETL pipelines to process COR, MAX, DTISO files into SQL databases — reducing manual labor by 80%
Built barcode generation modules improving laboratory data traceability for thousands of samples
Developed interactive Angular dashboards for molecular data visualization
Implemented CI/CD with Azure DevOps and streamlined IIS deployments
Built modular .NET 6.0 backend components for diagnostic workflows
Optimized SQL Server for high-volume data — significantly improving query performance

projects.title: Azure End-to-End Data Pipeline
projects.description: Complete medallion architecture pipeline ingesting public datasets via Azure Data Factory, transforming with Databricks + PySpark (Bronze/Silver/Gold), serving analytics via Synapse, and visualizing in Power BI.

projects.title: Telecom Churn Prediction (ANN)
projects.description: ML system comparing Logistic Regression, SVM, Random Forest, and ANN for customer churn prediction. Achieved 81.4% accuracy with AUC of 0.86. Includes demographic segmentation.

projects.title: Legal AI Assistant (RAG)
projects.description: AI-powered legal chatbot for individuals with disabilities. Uses RAG with HuggingFace embeddings, LLaMA3, and ChromaDB vector database. Built at GrandInnoHack hackathon.

projects.title: Real-Time Streaming Pipeline
projects.description: Real-time data streaming with Apache Kafka + Azure Event Hubs as broker, Spark Structured Streaming for processing, and live Power BI dashboard for metrics.

projects.title: dbt + Airflow Analytics Platform
projects.description: Modern data transformation platform using dbt for layered modeling (staging/intermediate/marts), Apache Airflow for orchestration, and built-in data quality testing.
